{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2006
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2006
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 15 – July 26
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
|runner-up       = [[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama (RJ)]]
|matches         = 112
|goals           = 346
|top goal scorer = {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Valdiram]] (7)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2005 Copa do Brasil|2005]]
|nextseason      = [[2007 Copa do Brasil|2007]]
}}

The '''2006''' '''Copa do Brasil''' was the 18th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 15, 2006 and concluded on July 26, 2006 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Maracanã]] in [[Rio de Janeiro]], in which [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] lifted the trophy for the second time with a 1–0 victory over its rival [[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]].

Valdiram, of [[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]], with 7 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 64 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, but in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Competition stages==
{{64TeamBracket

| RD1-team01=[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA (AL)]]
| RD1-score01=1 1
| RD1-team02='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score02=1 2

| RD1-team03=[[Parnahyba Esporte Clube|Parnahyba (PI)]]
| RD1-score03=0 1
| RD1-team04='''[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]'''
| RD1-score04=1 5

| RD1-team05=[[Estrela do Norte Futebol Clube|Estrela do Norte (ES)]]
| RD1-score05=1 0
| RD1-team06='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 3

| RD1-team07=[[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potiguar|Potiguar (RN)]]
| RD1-score07=2 2
| RD1-team08='''[[Esporte Clube Santo André|Santo André (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score08=0 1

| RD1-team09=[[Clube Atlético Hermann Aichinger|Hermann Aichinger (SC)]]
| RD1-score09=0
| RD1-team10='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score10=3

| RD1-team11='''[[Mineiros Esporte Clube|Mineiros (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score11=3 2
| RD1-team12=[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano (RJ)]]
| RD1-score12=1 4

| RD1-team13=[[Vilhena Esporte Clube|Vilhena (RO)]]
| RD1-score13=1
| RD1-team14='''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score14=3

| RD1-team15='''[[Ceilândia Esporte Clube|Ceilândia (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score15=0 2
| RD1-team16=[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
| RD1-score16=0 1

| RD1-team17=[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
| RD1-score17=1 1
| RD1-team18='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score18=2 5

| RD1-team19=[[Sociedade Desportiva Serra Futebol Clube|Serra (ES)]]
| RD1-score19=1
| RD1-team20='''[[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score20=3

| RD1-team21=[[Associação Desportiva Recreativa Cultural Icasa|Icasa (CE)]]
| RD1-score21=0 1
| RD1-team22='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score22=0 3

| RD1-team23=[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]
| RD1-score23=0 1
| RD1-team24='''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score24=1 4

| RD1-team25=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score25=0 0
| RD1-team26='''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score26=0 3

| RD1-team27='''[[União Recreativa dos Trabalhadores|URT (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score27=3 1
| RD1-team28=[[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina (PR)]]
| RD1-score28=2 1

| RD1-team29=[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (RR)|São Raimundo (RR)]]
| RD1-score29=0
| RD1-team30='''[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score30=2

| RD1-team31=[[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana (SE)]]
| RD1-score31=0 1
| RD1-team32='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score32=0 4

| RD1-team33=[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
| RD1-score33=1 0
| RD1-team34='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score34=1 7

| RD1-team35=[[Sport Club Ulbra|Ulbra (RS)]]
| RD1-score35=2
| RD1-team36='''[[Iraty Sport Club|Iraty (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score36=4

| RD1-team37=[[Associação Desportiva Cabofriense|Cabofriense (RJ)]]
| RD1-score37=1 1
| RD1-team38='''[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score38=1 4

| RD1-team39=[[Esporte Clube Novo Hamburgo|Novo Hamburgo (RS)]]
| RD1-score39=2 1
| RD1-team40='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score40=2 2

| RD1-team41=[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]]
| RD1-score41=1
| RD1-team42='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score42=3

| RD1-team43='''[[Volta Redonda Futebol Clube|Volta Redonda (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score43=2 1 (pen: 7)
| RD1-team44=[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
| RD1-score44=1 2 (pen: 6)

| RD1-team45=[[Piauí Esporte Clube|Piauí (PI)]]
| RD1-score45=1 0
| RD1-team46='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score46=2 4

| RD1-team47='''[[Clube 15 de Novembro|15 de Novembro (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score47=4 0
| RD1-team48=[[Esporte Clube Noroeste|Noroeste (SP)]]
| RD1-score48=1 2

| RD1-team49=[[Operário Futebol Clube (Várzea Grande)|Operário (MT)]]
| RD1-score49=2 1
| RD1-team50='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score50=3 3

| RD1-team51='''[[Centro Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE (MS)]]'''
| RD1-score51=2 3
| RD1-team52=[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]
| RD1-score52=1 1

| RD1-team53=[[Colinas Esporte Clube|Colinas (TO)]]
| RD1-score53=0
| RD1-team54='''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score54=2

| RD1-team55=[[Grêmio Atlético Coariense|Grêmio Coariense (AM)]]
| RD1-score55=2
| RD1-team56='''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score56=5

| RD1-team57=[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
| RD1-score57=2
| RD1-team58='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score58=5

| RD1-team59=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José (AP)]]
| RD1-score59=0 0
| RD1-team60='''[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]]'''
| RD1-score60=1 3

| RD1-team61=[[Sociedade Esportiva Vila Aurora|Vila Aurora (MT)]]
| RD1-score61=0 0
| RD1-team62='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score62=0 1

| RD1-team63=[[Sociedade Imperatriz de Desportos|Imperatriz (MA)]]
| RD1-score63=1 2
| RD1-team64='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score64=1 5

| RD2-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score01=1 4
| RD2-team02=ABC (RN)
| RD2-score02=0 0

| RD2-team03='''Guarani (SP)'''
| RD2-score03=4
| RD2-team04=Potiguar (RN)
| RD2-score04=0

| RD2-team05='''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD2-score05=2 4
| RD2-team06=Mineiros (GO)
| RD2-score06=3 1

| RD2-team07='''Fortaleza (CE)'''
| RD2-score07=1 3
| RD2-team08=Ceilândia (DF)
| RD2-score08=1 1

| RD2-team09=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score09=0 1
| RD2-team10='''Ipatinga (MG)'''
| RD2-score10=3 3

| RD2-team11=Coritiba (PR)
| RD2-score11=0 0
| RD2-team12='''Náutico (PE)'''
| RD2-score12=2 0

| RD2-team13='''Santos (SP)'''
| RD2-score13=3
| RD2-team14=URT (MG)
| RD2-score14=1

| RD2-team15='''Brasiliense (DF)'''
| RD2-score15=3 1
| RD2-team16=Remo (PA)
| RD2-score16=1 0

| RD2-team17='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score17=2 5
| RD2-team18=Iraty (PR)
| RD2-score18=2 1

| RD2-team19=São Caetano (SP)
| RD2-score19=4 0
| RD2-team20='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD2-score20=1 4

| RD2-team21=Atlético (PR)
| RD2-score21=1 0
| RD2-team22='''Volta Redonda (RJ)'''
| RD2-score22=2 0

| RD2-team23=Grêmio (RS)
| RD2-score23=0 1 (pen: 5)
| RD2-team24='''15 de Novembro (RS)'''
| RD2-score24=1 0 (pen: 6)

| RD2-team25='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score25=5
| RD2-team26=CENE (MS)
| RD2-score26=3

| RD2-team27=Paysandu (PA)
| RD2-score27=1 1
| RD2-team28='''Vila Nova (GO)'''
| RD2-score28=3 0

| RD2-team29='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD2-score29=2
| RD2-team30=CRB (AL)
| RD2-score30=0

| RD2-team31=Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD2-score31=2 2
| RD2-team32='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score32=2 3

| RD3-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score01=5 0
| RD3-team02=Guarani (SP)
| RD3-score02=1 1

| RD3-team03='''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD3-score03=0 3
| RD3-team04=Fortaleza (CE)
| RD3-score04=2 1

| RD3-team05='''Ipatinga (MG)'''
| RD3-score05=3 3
| RD3-team06=Náutico (PE)
| RD3-score06=1 1

| RD3-team07='''Santos (SP)'''
| RD3-score07=2 1
| RD3-team08=Brasiliense (DF)
| RD3-score08=1 1

| RD3-team09='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD3-score09=2 1
| RD3-team10=Criciúma (SC)
| RD3-score10=1 0

| RD3-team11='''Volta Redonda (RJ)'''
| RD3-score11=1 1
| RD3-team12=15 de Novembro (RS)
| RD3-score12=0 2

| RD3-team13='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD3-score13=2 4
| RD3-team14=Vila Nova (GO)
| RD3-score14=2 0

| RD3-team15='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD3-score15=1 4
| RD3-team16=Vitória (BA)
| RD3-score16=2 0

| RD4-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD4-score01=4 0
| RD4-team02=Atlético (MG)
| RD4-score02=1 0

| RD4-team03='''Ipatinga (MG)'''
| RD4-score03=1 1 (pen: 5)
| RD4-team04=Santos (SP)
| RD4-score04=1 1 (pen: 3)

| RD4-team05='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD4-score05=0 2
| RD4-team06=Volta Redonda (RJ)
| RD4-score06=0 1

| RD4-team07='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD4-score07=3 1
| RD4-team08=Cruzeiro (MG)
| RD4-score08=2 0

| RD5-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD5-score01=1 2
| RD5-team02=Ipatinga (MG)
| RD5-score02=1 1

| RD5-team03='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD5-score03=1 1
| RD5-team04=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD5-score04=0 1

| RD6-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD6-score01=2 1
| RD6-team02=Vasco (RJ)
| RD6-score02=0 0
}}

==Finals==
{{footballbox
|date = July 19, 2006
|time = 21:45
|team1 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|score = 2 &ndash; 0
|aet = 
|report = 
|team2 = [[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|goals1 = [[Obina]] {{goal|59}} <br />[[Luiz Bombonato Goulart|Luizão]] {{goal|62}}
|goals2 =
|stadium = [[Estádio do Maracanã|Maracanã]], [[Rio de Janeiro, Brazil|Rio de Janeiro]]
|attendance = 45,000
|referee = [[Leonardo Gaciba]] 
}}
----
{{footballbox
|date = July 26, 2006
|time = 21:30 [[Central European Summer Time|CEST]]
|team1 = [[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|score = 0 &ndash; 1 <br>(0 &ndash; 3 [[Playoff format#Total points series (aggregate)|agg.]])
|aet = 
|report = 
|team2 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|goals1 =
|goals2 = [[Juan Maldonado Jaimez|Juan]] {{goal|27}}
|stadium = [[Estádio do Maracanã|Maracanã]], [[Rio de Janeiro, Brazil|Rio de Janeiro]]
|attendance = 45,000
|referee = [[Carlos Eugênio Simon]]
}}
<br />
{| width=92% |
|-
|{{Football kit
 |pattern_la = _borderonblack
 |pattern_b  =_whiterightsash
 |pattern_ra = _borderonblack
 |leftarm    = FFFFFF
 |body       = 000000
 |rightarm   = FFFFFF
 |shorts     = 000000
 |socks      = 000000
 |title      = Vasco da Gama
}}
|{{Football kit
 |pattern_la = 
 |pattern_b  = _redhoops
 |pattern_ra = 
 |leftarm    = FF0000
 |body       = 000000
 |rightarm   = FF0000
 |shorts     = FFFFFF
 |socks      = 000000
 |pattern_so = _hoops_red
 |title      = Flamengo
}}
|}
{| width="100%"
|valign="top" width="50%"|
{| style="font-size: 90%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" align=center
|colspan="4"|''' '''
|-
!width=25| !!width=25|
|-
|GK ||'''1'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Cássio (footballer, born August 1980)|Cássio]]
|-
|RB ||'''2'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Wagner Diniz]] || {{yel|39}}
|-
|CB ||'''3'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Fábio Braz]]
|-
|CB ||'''4'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Jorge Luiz Alves Justino|Jorge Luiz]]
|-
|LB ||'''6'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Diego Pereira Corrêa|Diego]]
|-
|DM ||'''5'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ygor Santiago|Ygor]]
|-
|DM ||'''19'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[João Henrique de Andrade Amaral|Andrade]] || || {{suboff|53}}
|-
|MF ||'''9'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ramon Menezes Hubner|Ramon]] || || {{suboff|32}}
|-
|AM ||'''8'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Manoel Morais Amorim|Morais]] || {{yel}} || {{suboff|57}}
|-
|FW ||'''10'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Edilson]] ([[Captain (association football)|c]])
|-
|FW ||'''7'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Valdir Papel]] || {{sent off|0|17}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Substitutes:'''
|-
|MF ||'''15'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Abedi (footballer)|Abedi]] ||  || {{subon|53}} || {{yel}}
|-
|MF ||'''16'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ernane Ferreira Cavalheira Campos|Ernane]] || || {{subon|57}}
|-
|FW ||'''18'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Valdiram Caetano de Moraes|Valdiram]] || || {{subon|32}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Manager:'''
|-
|colspan=4| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Gaúcho]]
|}
|
{| style="font-size: 90%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" align=center
|colspan="4"|''' '''
|-
!width=25| !!width=25|
|-
|GK ||'''1'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Diego Salgado Costa de Menezes|Diego]]
|-
|DF ||'''3'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Silva]]
|-
|DF ||'''4'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Fernando Santos (Brazilian footballer born 1980)|Fernando]] || {{yel}}
|-
|DF ||'''8'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rodrigo Arroz]]
|-
|RM ||'''2'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Leonardo da Silva Moura|Leonardo Moura]]
|-
|DM ||'''5'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Jonatas Domingos|Jonatas]] ([[Captain (association football)|c]])
|-
|DM ||'''7'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Toró]] || {{yel|12}} || {{suboff|19}}
|-
|CM ||'''11'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Abreu|Renato]]
|-
|AM ||'''10'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Augusto]] || {{yel}} || {{suboff|76}}
|-
|LM ||'''6'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Juan Maldonado Jaimez|Juan]]
|-
|FW ||'''9'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Luiz Bombonato Goulart|Luizão]] || {{yel|25}} || {{suboff|86}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Substitutes:'''
|-
|MF ||'''16'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Léo Oliveira|Léo]] || || {{subon|86}}
|-
|FW ||'''17'''|| {{flagicon|URU}} [[Horacio Peralta]] || || {{subon|76}}
|-
|FW ||'''18'''|| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Obina]] || || {{subon|19}}
|-
|colspan=3|'''Manager:'''
|-
|colspan=4| {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ney Franco]]
|}
|}
<br/>
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2006 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do estado do Rio de Janeiro.svg|100px|Rio de Janeiro]]<br>'''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''<br/>'''Second Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071225181457/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2006.htm Copa do Brasil 2006 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}
{{2006 in South American football (CONMEBOL)}}

{{Use mdy dates|date=February 2012}}

[[Category:2006 in domestic association football cups|Copa do Brazil]]
[[Category:2006 in Brazilian football|Copa do Brazil]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2006]]
